Paper2.title: Background and Challenges
key_info: Real Crimes cycle showing challenges and expenditure protection
More than 400 bitcoin absolute incidents per day
Around USD 1.35 Bn spent on loss prevention
Definition section explains retail loss prevention as asset protection important for companies to prevent profits
What we offer section mentions Solucions combine traditional security and surveillance with advanced technology
Mentions Smart POS, Internal Alerts System, POS Integration, and advanced detection systems
Paper2.raw_text: Background Real Crimes Challenges More than 400 bitcoin absolute incidents per day Around USD 1.35 Bn spent on loss prevention Expenditure protection Definition Retail loss prevention is asset protection important for companies to prevent profits. Companies use various methods including employee background checks, asset protection, and surveillance systems to prevent theft and loss. What we offer? Solucions combine traditional security and surveillance with advanced technology and streamline the workflow. A Smart POS, Internal Alerts System, POS Integration, and advanced detection systems help prevent theft and loss. Thank you for shopping with us

Paper3.raw_text: SHANGHE Company Profile JiaShan Shanghe Display is a leading manufacturer of POP display and retail components for all retail stores and supermarkets. We expertize in providing one-stop solutions for customers. JiaShan Shanghe Display established in 2000,who mainly do data strips,shelf pusher systems,POP display and other accessories for supermarkets and retail stores. We have more than 12 extrusion machines, 5 injection machines and 5 bending machines to meet request for large qty and fast delivery. We located in Jiashan,which near to Shanghai and Ningbo Port,with convenient transport and fast delivery. 01 02 03 04 05 Shanghe
